attempts.result: local watcher timed out during the runner queue; the host never appeared in local Tailscale status or DNS after the job reached its external-control hold
the job reached its external-control hold, but the host never appeared in local Tailscale status or DNS; the lease was cancelled

gui_video.reason: Neither leased Mac became reachable over Tailscale/SSH, so CUA bootstrap, GUI interaction, and full-screen recording could not start.
